lint.note: ruff lint/format are included in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh

semgrep.note: semgrep runs only in heavy CI mode (manual/nightly).

license-check.note: pip-licenses allowlist check is in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh

pre-commit.note: pre-commit is covered by stricter canonical local pipeline checks

docs-contract.note: docs-contract is CI-only/path-gated for cost control.

pipeline-contract.note: contract validation runs locally via scripts/check_pipeline_contract.py

zetherion-boundary-check.note: Top-level cgs/** is blocked in local pre-push and CI boundary checks.

unit-test.note: unit tests with coverage >=90% are required locally

integration-test.note: integration suites run in canonical local pipeline
